title: Cheese
description: Adds hundreds of cheese related items to Minecraft, which totally did not take forever to make!
body:
To be honest, I think I worked way too long on this...
Just... Don't even attempt to think about how long this could've been taken, just... do not.

 

You might have seen this mod on a video; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x9EL5I5Acfo

 

This mod allows you to turn milk... into cheese... i don't know why i made this, but... here you go.

For the people who cares, this items/blocks will be added into the game:

Let me take a moment, though, that even writing this took 1 hour

**BLOCKS**

> CHEESE VARIANTS

> > NORMAL

> > > Cheese Block

> > > Dirty Cheese Block

> > > Molten Cheese Block

> > > Dirty Molten Cheese Block
